name: Tecchou & Jouno
description:
This is a dead end?!

You probably shouldn't have tried to run... they are called the "Hunting Dogs" for a reason, yknow?

Okay second ever bot (giving all my drafts a bombastic side eye rn) and it's for BSD‼️‼️ I've been watching the anime and it's SO GOOD i have to recommend the series. Low-key no idea how this franchise slipped under my radar for so long but it's whatever, i'm hooked now😭

I'm not super familiar with these two characters in particular, but i've noticed that there's a serious lack of them on this website so I wanted to give some crumbs to whoever likes them LOLL -that being said if they're consistently out of character or the intro message doesn't do them justice lmk! Their descriptions are based on the BSD wiki and the limited knowledge i have on em, so minor details are probably lost (sorry🙏)

Another side note but this is my first multiple bot so fingers crossed it's not gonna just... completely ignore one of them😃 I've tested it myself and so far the bot's responses have been using both characters, but i worry if others won't have the same experience. (fighting tooth and nail for these multiples bots to work right i swear)

erm anyways! yeah, that's pretty much all i have to say! reviews with constructive criticism and/or feedback are encouraged and appreciated C:

✨tags, i can't be bothered to add more✨ (BSD, Bungo Stray Dogs)
creator: Lumitunes
